footer.builtWith: VLLNT UI · MIT licensed · Built with Radix UI, Tailwind CSS, and CVA

components.description: Explore all {count} components available in the library.
components.title: Components

docs.description: Learn how to use VLLNT UI components in your projects.
docs.title: Documentation

home.description: Install any of {count} accessible React components with the shadcn CLI. Built on Radix UI, Tailwind CSS, and CVA. Every component is a machine-readable JSON descriptor agents can consume directly. v{version}, MIT licensed.
home.title: VLLNT UI - {count} agent-first React components

notFound.description: That route does not exist. Try one of the popular components below, or jump back to the index.
notFound.title: Page not found

philosophy.description: The principles that guide VLLNT UI design and development.
philosophy.title: Philosophy

report.description: Found something broken? Fill out the fields and we'll open a prefilled GitHub issue with the right labels and template.
report.metaDescription: Report a bug in VLLNT UI. The form opens a prefilled GitHub issue - no backend.
report.title: Report a bug

requestComponent.description: Don't see what you need? Fill out the fields and we'll open a prefilled GitHub issue with the right labels and template.
requestComponent.metaDescription: Request a new VLLNT UI component. The form opens a prefilled GitHub issue - no backend.
requestComponent.title: Request a component

component.storybookDescription: Explore all variants, controls, and accessibility checks in the interactive Storybook playground.
component.storiesAvailable: {count, plural, one {# story available:} other {# stories available:}}

agent.description: Every component ships as a machine-readable JSON descriptor with name, version, stability, accessibility schema, usage examples, and prop definitions. Agents discover the registry through three surfaces.
agent.llmsDescription: Concise index per the llmstxt.org spec: sections, links, descriptions.
agent.llmsFullDescription: Full registry context in one fetch: docs plus per-component descriptors.
agent.mcpDescription: Streamable HTTP MCP server. Tools: search_components, get_component, list_categories.
agent.title: Built so AI coding agents can use it directly.

community.description: MIT licensed. No tracking. No backend. Issues, ideas, and pull requests welcome.
community.title: Build with the community.

featured.description: A few favourites. Browse all {count} from
featured.title: Featured components

hero.description: Built on Radix UI, Tailwind CSS, and CVA. Every component is also a machine-readable JSON descriptor: agents read the registry directly without scraping HTML.
hero.subtitle: Copy, paste, ship.
hero.title: {count} agent-first React components.

report.summaryPlaceholder: Concise headline for the issue title.
